scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm --workspace electron-app run build && npm --workspace electron-app run start
scripts.dev:all: npm --workspace electron-app run build && npm-run-all -p --continue-on-error dev:backend dev:frontend dev:electron
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && GROVE_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm --workspace electron-app run start
